<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please keep the checklist honest. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link related issues (Fixes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer analyse` (PHPStan level 10) passes
- [ ] `src/Engine/**` stays free of `Illuminate\*`
- [ ] Updated docs / README where relevant
